headline: vocab_size=6400 edges out 6144 frontier by 0.0001 (0.03%) with minimal extra artifact cost
frontier_update: New best is vocab_size=6400 with character_coverage=0.999 at score 0.34832; the optimal vocab size appears to be in the 6144-6400+ range with diminishing but still positive returns from adding tokens
next_direction: Test vocab_size=7168 or 8192 to find where the artifact cost penalty overtakes the compression benefit and locate the true optimum
